body:
Changes: * `yyjson 0.10.0` is required * Fastfetch no longer prints `*` (which means it's the default route) if `defaultRouteOnly` is set (LocalIP) Bugfixes: * Fix some memory leaks * Fix compatibility with old Python versions * Don't detect frequency for AMD cards (GPU, Linux) * Fix possible hang with discrete AMD cards (#1077) * Don't print colors in `--pipe` mode (Separator) * Don't print `(null)` in property `locator` (PhysicalMemory) * Ignore disabled PCI devices (GPU) * Fix flag `--opengl-library` doesn't work (OpenGL) Features: * Detect revision of USB drives (#1048, Disk) * Support fractional scale factor detection (Display, Linux) * Support primary display detection for KDE and GNOME (Display, Linux) * Support percent bar in custom formatting * Print signal quality by default (Wifi) * Detect used OpenGL library version (OpenGL) * Support detecting OpenGL version by `EGL` (ANGLE) on Windows (OpenGL) ---
